question.text: For options, all in-the-money (ITM) stock options are automatically exercised on:

answer.text: Only if the holder gives exercise instruction

explanation.text: **The Logic:** All ITM stock options are automatically exercised on expiry day. No manual exercise instruction is needed. **The Trap:** Unlike some international markets, Indian ITM options are auto-exercised. This prevents clients from losing intrinsic value. **Cross-Exam Context:** Auto-exercise is a key feature of Indian options markets. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** ITM options have intrinsic value on expiry - auto-exercise ensures this value is not lost.
